MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SEAN JOYCE Motion to Enter Judgment Per CCP 664.6. Appearances: Darrel C. Horsted, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 291-1900 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; G. Cat Stokes, Esq. Attorney at Law, (916) 737-6800 appearing for Defendant and opposing party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Defense counsel's opposition was rejected by the Clerk's Office) (Counsel may each prepare a form of order; The Court is allowing Defense counsel to submit his own proposed Order, even though no opposition was filed.)
